title: plagiobothrys figuratus subsp. corallicarpus
intro: Plagiobothrys figuratus subsp. corallicarpus, also known as Coral-fruited False Sea Blush, is a flowering plant species in the borage family native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Plagiobothrys figuratus subsp. corallicarpus typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves.
